10. Build Tree Alignment Review
- Dominios del Build Tree con muchos archivos reales: Nash Conversation Intelligence, Relationship Intelligence, Productivity Intelligence, Conservation Intelligence, Forecast Intelligence, Advisor Experience Intelligence, Business Planning Intelligence, Compensation Intelligence, Economic Motivation, Revenue Generation, Sales Conversion, Product Intelligence, Policy & Sales Operations, Manager & Team Intelligence, Learning Intelligence, Command OS, Alfred / Universal Command Bar, Evidence & Provenance, RuleSnapshot / Rule Pack, PeriodSnapshot / Operational Clocks, Shared Commercial Model, Platform Services
- Dominios del Build Tree sin archivos detectados: Advisor Development Intelligence, Manager Compensation Intelligence
- Archivos reales que no aparecen representados en Build Tree: domains Unknown / Needs Review (28), Shared Core (52), Recruitment Intelligence (6)
- Módulos del Build Tree que parecen duplicar módulos reales: Command OS / Alfred needs naming care because code still contains command-palette files while docs define Alfred / Universal Command Bar as advisor-facing experience.
- Riesgos de naming desalineado: If command-palette appears in user-facing docs, suggest Alfred / Universal Command Bar. Do not rename code without a separate refactor plan.

11. Recommended Cleanup Roadmap
Phase 1 - Documentation only
- Crear mapa de dominios.
- Crear md por módulo importante.
- Marcar legacy / duplicate / unknown.
- No mover código.
Phase 2 - Safe grouping proposal
- Proponer estructura de carpetas futura.
- No ejecutar todavía.
Phase 3 - Dependency hardening
- Resolver imports circulares confirmados.
- Identificar shared core.
Phase 4 - Refactor only after tests
- Solo mover/refactorizar cuando existan tests y aceptación.

- No code modified.
